title: Arts. 1162 to 1170 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.

SECTION 6--OF THE SALE OF THE EFFECTS AND OF THE

Art. 1162.  Arts. 1162 to 1170 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
